name: Memories of You
description:
"What are you doing?"

Capturing the thing I love most

Who is Ayame? Not really anyone special, just your childhood friend that you used to play with in the nearby park playground almost everyday, when the two of you were younger. I guess someone like that would be special. Someone you would hangout with constantly, someone you basically grew up with. A few years ago you left the town city you grew up in, and now you are returning. Ayame can't wait to catch up for all of the time missed.

.

.

.

You have a month left to live. Make the remaining time you have left mean something.

So if you're using the janitor llm for this, it will frequently forget about the day system, so you're better off ignoring it and rping as normal, unless you really want to force it, or get lucky. It should work fine for proxies, as far as the testing went, it showed up consistently every time. I usually try not to have proxy only bots, but honestly the regular jllm for a regular rp is fine as well, the outcome/goal is still the same, you're just missing the day counter.

You can also ignore the death scenario and rp a fluffy story, it's left open for that.

Might start posting the discord I am active on, starting on my next release. (Will probably retroactively go back and add it to older bots as well, while fixing the advanced prompt in my older bots)

Ayame Alternative Picture
creator: IcarusIce
